room.caption: [WarshipZ_B]
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(99) background_visible[1]=1; background_visible[2]=1 background_alpha[1]=0.04; background_alpha[2]=0.04
abilSetRemove(1) global.hasShoes[0]=2; global.hasShoes[1]=2 global.canCharSwap=2; global.canDoubleJump=2 global.hasAbilToken[0]=2
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh20MainA) mapScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh20SideA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(1016) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: talker="Warmaster Log 0003" stringToShow="This bot says it will escape from the Vault soon. I do wonder why it was placed there at all. Still, it has presented an opportunity to reclaim this land for bots. To make it a safe haven for us. I can't do it on my own..." boxSize=3

talker="Warmaster Log 0004" stringToShow="The bot known as Hex has escaped from the Vault as he said. Our plans are moving along perfectly. However, I am having second thoughts. I know this bot has its own agenda to fulfill, however, it is nefarious in nature. Do I continue...?" boxSize=3
spinSpd=-4 changeDelay=0 moveSpd=0 image_angle=180 image_xscale=1.1 image_yscale=1.1
spriteUseN=sWS_LightBall shootTimeN=30 shootDelayN=60 atkPowerN=12 dirN=270 bulletSpeedN=4
spriteUseN=sWS_LightBall shootTimeN=30 shootDelayN=60 atkPowerN=12 dirN=270 bulletSpeedN=4
